issues.description: Action type 'SearchDeck' with destination 'hand' is incorrect. Card text says 'look at 3 cards from top of deck and return them to top or bottom' — this is a library manipulation effect, not a search-to-hand. Should use a custom action or represent as viewing/reordering deck cards, not drawing.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is not mentioned in card text and should not be present. This appears to be erroneous data.
Filter specifies 'Any' but text explicitly limits to '3 cards from the top of your deck' — count constraint missing.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and return them to the top or bottom of the deck in any order.
